texto: A person may know things by somebody else's experience but a person will always learn things by his own personal experience.

texto: We meet lots of people in a lifetime and we lose some of them over a period of time . But every person who comes in lives has a purpose to serve.. NO MEETING IS AN ACCIDENT, EVERY PERSON THAT WE MEET PLAYS A ROLE IN OUR LIVES, WHETHER WE REALIZE IT OR NOT.

texto: Consider our body as a temple and our heart as a place where God or the Guru resides. If we open up our hearts like the gates of the Golden Temple, if we don’t fight with each other in the name of religion, if we treat every individual equally then the God inside us will be happy. When the God inside us becomes happy, we will become happy and when we will become happy then the temple will look all the more beautiful.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Raj Kiran Atagaraha: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Consider our body as a temple and our heart as a place where God or the Guru resides. If we open …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, golden-temple, history pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de history e humanity.

frase_original: Consider our body as a temple and our heart as a place where God or the Guru resides. If we open up our hearts like the gates of the Golden Temple, if we don’t fight with each other in the name of religion, if we treat every individual equally then the God inside us will be happy. When the God inside us becomes happy, we will become happy and when we will become happy then the temple will look all the more beautiful.
